differentials_index.vexas-2020: VEXAS Syndrome (UBA1 somatic; adult inflammatory mimic)

tiers.tier_1_local: Available in Klang Valley, days–weeks turnaround, RM <2k typical
tiers.tier_2_regional: Send-out to Singapore / regional, weeks turnaround, RM 2–8k
tiers.tier_3_research: Research-only or international send-out, RM 5k+, longest turnaround

tests.name: Extended myositis-specific antibody panel (Euroimmun 16-Ag)
tests.rationale: Picks up anti-MDA5 (rapidly-progressive ILD risk), anti-TIF1γ (cancer-associated), anti-NXP2, anti-SAE, anti-HMGCR — none on the standard ANA-ENA. Single highest-yield rheumatology send-out for any myositis-overlap picture.
tests.citation: Lundberg IE et al. Ann Rheum Dis 2017 (EULAR/ACR IIM); McHugh NJ Arthritis Rheumatol 2018.

tests.name: Anti-cN-1A (NT5C1A) autoantibody
tests.rationale: Inclusion Body Myositis (IBM) marker — IBM is steroid-refractory and immunosuppression often harms. Mis-classification as polymyositis is common; this single test rerouts care.
tests.citation: Larman HB et al. Ann Neurol 2013; Rietveld A et al. Curr Opin Rheumatol 2018.

tests.name: Glycosylated ferritin percentage
tests.rationale: Glycosylated ferritin <20% is highly specific for AOSD and macrophage-activation syndrome. Cheap, fast, differentiates from infection/malignancy when total ferritin is high.
tests.citation: Fautrel B et al. Medicine 2002; Lebrun D et al. Ann Rheum Dis 2018.

tests.name: Whole-body MRI (STIR / DIXON, no contrast)
tests.rationale: Maps inflammation in muscle, fascia, joints, bone marrow in one pass. Picks up subclinical myositis, sacroiliitis, eosinophilic-fasciitis pattern, marrow oedema invisible on plain films.
tests.citation: Schalke B et al. Curr Opin Rheumatol 2016.

tests.name: High-resolution CT chest, ILD protocol + DLCO
tests.rationale: NSIP / OP / UIP patterns are differential-defining. Anti-synthetase, anti-MDA5, IgG4-RD, AAV all have characteristic ILD signatures invisible on plain CXR.
tests.citation: Travis WD et al. AJRCCM 2013; Solomon JJ et al. Curr Opin Rheumatol 2016.

tests.name: Whole-body FDG PET-CT
tests.rationale: Single highest-yield 'find-the-inflammation' scan when conventional imaging is unrevealing. Vessel-wall uptake → large-vessel vasculitis; lymph-node uptake → IgG4-RD vs lymphoma; muscle uptake → myositis.
tests.citation: Soussan M et al. J Nucl Med 2014; Schönau V et al. Ann Rheum Dis 2018.

tests.name: ANCA with quantitative PR3 and MPO ELISA
tests.rationale: Distinguishes GPA (PR3) from MPA / EGPA (MPO). Quantitative ELISA also tracks disease activity. Standard-of-care first test for any vasculitis suspicion.
tests.citation: Robson JC et al. Ann Rheum Dis 2022 (ACR/EULAR AAV).

tests.name: Complement C3, C4, CH50
tests.rationale: Low complement is a 2019 EULAR/ACR SLE criterion (5 points if both C3 and C4 low). CH50 zero suggests inherited complement deficiency (SLE-predisposing).
tests.citation: Aringer M et al. Ann Rheum Dis 2019.

tests.name: Anti-dsDNA (Crithidia or ELISA) + Anti-Sm
tests.rationale: Anti-dsDNA highly specific for SLE and tracks lupus nephritis activity. Anti-Sm is essentially pathognomonic when present. Both score 6 points each in 2019 EULAR/ACR SLE.
tests.citation: Aringer M et al. Ann Rheum Dis 2019.

tests.name: Anti-CCP (high-titre) + Rheumatoid Factor quantitative
tests.rationale: High-titre anti-CCP (>3× ULN) scores 3 points in 2010 ACR/EULAR RA. Far more specific than RF alone. RF quantitative also tracks AOSD-vs-RA borderline cases.
tests.citation: Aletaha D et al. Ann Rheum Dis 2010.

tests.name: Extended ENA panel (anti-Ro/SSA, La/SSB, RNP, Scl-70, centromere)
tests.rationale: Anti-Ro/SSA scores 3 points in 2016 ACR/EULAR Sjögren's. Anti-La rarely positive without anti-Ro. Mixed-CTD if anti-RNP dominant; scleroderma-overlap if Scl-70 / centromere.
tests.citation: Shiboski CH et al. Ann Rheum Dis 2017.

tests.name: Minor salivary gland (lip) biopsy with focus score
tests.rationale: Focus score ≥1 (lymphocytic infiltrate per 4mm²) scores 3 points in 2016 ACR/EULAR Sjögren's. Necessary in seronegative-but-clinical Sjögren's.
tests.citation: Shiboski CH et al. Ann Rheum Dis 2017; Daniels TE et al. Arthritis Rheum 2011.

tests.name: Schirmer test + tear osmolarity + ocular surface staining
tests.rationale: Schirmer ≤5mm/5min and ocular staining score ≥5 each contribute to 2016 ACR/EULAR Sjögren's. Easy ophthalmology referral.
tests.citation: Shiboski CH et al. Ann Rheum Dis 2017.

tests.name: IgG subclasses 1–4 (with IgG4 quantitation)
tests.rationale: Serum IgG4 >135 mg/dL (or IgG4/total IgG >8%) is a major entry criterion for 2019 ACR/EULAR IgG4-RD. Also helps rule out IgG4 mimics (Castleman, hyper-IL-6 states).
tests.citation: Wallace ZS et al. Ann Rheum Dis 2020.

tests.name: Target-organ biopsy with IgG4+ plasma cell IHC
tests.rationale: Storiform fibrosis + obliterative phlebitis + IgG4+/IgG ratio >40% is the histopathologic gold standard for IgG4-RD. Differentiates from lymphoma and other mimics.
tests.citation: Deshpande V et al. Mod Pathol 2012; Wallace ZS et al. Ann Rheum Dis 2020.

tests.name: Bone marrow biopsy with vacuolated myeloid precursor scoring
tests.rationale: Vacuolated myeloid and erythroid precursors are pathognomonic for VEXAS. With UBA1 sequencing, completes the diagnosis. Reframes 'refractory autoimmune' as a haem-onc disease.
tests.citation: Beck DB et al. NEJM 2020;383:2628–2638.

tests.name: Karius cell-free pathogen DNA sequencing
tests.rationale: Sequences cell-free DNA from >1000 bacteria, fungi, viruses, parasites in a single blood draw. Rules out occult Bartonella, Coxiella, Whipple's, atypical mycobacteria — all mimic adult inflammatory disease.
tests.citation: Blauwkamp TA et al. Nat Microbiol 2019.

tests.name: Targeted UBA1 deep sequencing (somatic mosaic, ≥1000× depth)
tests.rationale: Single test that REFRAMES the diagnosis. UBA1 p.Met41 somatic mutation defines VEXAS. Standard panels miss it (mosaic in myeloid lineage); needs deep sequencing of blood DNA. Treatment changes completely (azacitidine, JAKi, allo-HSCT).
tests.citation: Beck DB et al. NEJM 2020;383:2628–2638.

tests.name: PhIP-Seq genome-wide autoantibody discovery (T7 phage display)
tests.rationale: Probes the entire human proteome for autoantibodies — finds antibodies not on any commercial panel. Has reframed autoimmune encephalitis, paraneoplastic syndromes, and seronegative myositis cases. The 'Hail Mary' for genuinely unexplained autoimmunity.
tests.citation: Vazquez SE et al. Cell 2022; Mandel-Brehm C et al. NEJM 2019.

tests.name: Whole-blood RNA-seq with type-I IFN signature score
tests.rationale: IFN-high → SLE / Sjögren's / VEXAS / interferonopathy / dermatomyositis (anti-MDA5). IFN-low → AOSD / IgG4-RD / RA. Predicts response to anifrolumab (IFN-blocker) and JAK inhibitors.
tests.citation: El-Sherbiny YM et al. Sci Rep 2018; Rice GI et al. Lancet Neurol 2013.

tests.name: Olink Explore 3072 plasma proteomics panel
tests.rationale: Quantifies 3000+ plasma proteins. Identifies inflammatory subtypes by protein signature, not symptom. UK Biobank reference data on 500k people unlocked rapid pattern matching. Best when conventional panels fail to discriminate.
tests.citation: Sun BB et al. Nature 2023; Eldjarn GH et al. Nature 2023.

tests.name: Pharmacogenomic panel (HLA-B*58:01 + NUDT15 + TPMT + HLA-B*15:02)
tests.rationale: NUDT15 c.415C>T (~10% East Asian carriers) → severe azathioprine myelosuppression. HLA-B*58:01 (~10% Chinese/Malay) → 580× allopurinol SJS/TEN risk. Standard of care in Malaysia before any thiopurine or allopurinol.
tests.citation: Hung S-I et al. PNAS 2005; Yang J-J et al. JAMA 2014; CPIC guidelines 2018.

tests.name: TCR-β + BCR repertoire deep sequencing
tests.rationale: Detects oligoclonal expansions suggesting evolving lymphoma vs. polyclonal autoimmune. CMV/EBV exposure history readable. Plasmablast clones predict Sjögren's lymphoma transformation risk.
tests.citation: Robins HS et al. Sci Transl Med 2010; Carlson CS et al. Nat Commun 2013.

tests.name: PET with fibroblast activation protein inhibitor (FAPI) tracer
tests.rationale: 5–10× more sensitive than FDG-PET for fibrosing diseases. Rapidly becoming imaging-of-choice for IgG4-RD, large-vessel vasculitis, fibrosing pneumonitis. Available at NCC Singapore.
tests.citation: Schmidkonz C et al. Eur J Nucl Med Mol Imaging 2020; Luo Y et al. Eur J Nucl Med 2021.
